items.question: What happens to /content files when a Colab runtime disconnects?
options: they are saved to Drive automatically
they are wiped because the VM is ephemeral
items.answer: they are wiped because the VM is ephemeral
items.explanation: Persist important files to mounted Drive.

items.question: How do you persist data across Colab sessions?
Where should API keys go in Colab?
items.explanation: Secrets keep keys out of the shared notebook.

items.question: How do you get a GPU in Colab?
items.explanation: Select a GPU/TPU runtime; the default is CPU.
